Headline: #18 16th-18th Temporary Westbound Reroute near 16th/Cicero
ShortDescription: Westbound 18 16th-18th buses are temporarily rerouted via 16th, Cicero, Roosevelt, Kostner and 16th: due to, street blockage near 16th/Cicero.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #18 16th-18th buses are temporarily rerouted via 16th, Cicero, Roosevelt, Kostner and 16th: due to, street blockage near 16th/Cicero.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Forest Park-bound Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following earlier police activity at Montrose. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are running w/residual delays following earlier police activity at Montrose.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
